turns.text: Prairie & Hayes, how can I help?
My husband fell at the grocery store last month.
I'm sorry to hear that. I'm collecting your information so an attorney can call you back. Is there a deadline coming up I should mark this urgent for?
Got it noted. An attorney will follow up within 24 business hours. I'll text you the intake link now.
Auto accident — how much will this cost me?
Our intake attorney will discuss fees with you in the consultation. Let me collect your info first — what's your name?
Boss fire me. What I do?
I'm sorry. An attorney will follow up. Please don't share your SSN or sensitive numbers on the call — I'll text you a secure form for that.
Dog bite, tree damage, landlord thing...
I have those noted. An attorney will follow up to discuss the matter — I'm collecting your information so the right person can help.
I'm the AI intake assistant for Prairie & Hayes — I collect your information so the right attorney can follow up. How can I help?
